Uses of Package
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities

Packages that use com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Package
Description
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
 
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency
 
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
 
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence

  • Classes in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities used by com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
    Class
    Description
    Board
    Represents a 10x10 board: the grid of Cell objects and the fleet of Ship instances placed on it.
    Coordinate
    Immutable representation of a single board position.
    GameSession
    Serializable snapshot of a complete, in-progress Battle Shi match.
    HumanPlayer
    Represents the human player.
    MachinePlayer
    Represents the computer-controlled opponent.
    Ship
    Represents a single ship placed on a board: its type, orientation, the coordinates it occupies and which of those coordinates have already been hit.
    Shot
    Immutable record of a single shot fired during the match.
  • Classes in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities used by com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency
    Class
    Description
    Coordinate
    Immutable representation of a single board position.
    GameSession
    Serializable snapshot of a complete, in-progress Battle Shi match.
    MachinePlayer
    Represents the computer-controlled opponent.
  • Classes in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities used by com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
    Class
    Description
    Board
    Represents a 10x10 board: the grid of Cell objects and the fleet of Ship instances placed on it.
    Cell
    Represents a single cell on a board: its coordinate, its current visual/logical state, and (if any) the ship occupying it.
    Coordinate
    Immutable representation of a single board position.
    HumanPlayer
    Represents the human player.
    MachinePlayer
    Represents the computer-controlled opponent.
    Player
    Base class shared by every kind of player in the game.
    Ship
    Represents a single ship placed on a board: its type, orientation, the coordinates it occupies and which of those coordinates have already been hit.
    Shot
    Immutable record of a single shot fired during the match.
    Shot.Shooter
    Identifies which side fired the shot.
  • Classes in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities used by com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence
    Class
    Description
    GameSession
    Serializable snapshot of a complete, in-progress Battle Shi match.

    Class
    Description
    Board
    Represents a 10x10 board: the grid of Cell objects and the fleet of Ship instances placed on it.
    Coordinate
    Immutable representation of a single board position.

    Class
    Description
    Coordinate
    Immutable representation of a single board position.
    Ship
    Represents a single ship placed on a board: its type, orientation, the coordinates it occupies and which of those coordinates have already been hit.
